goal: Harden the factory pipeline: drain the pipeline-integrity backlog strictly by weight — verdict diagnosability (acs-verdict always written with reason), lost-work landing floors (ship-landed verification; salvage cycles 948/949), gate/guard wiring proofs, contention false-RED elimination at the ACS-predicate layer, phase-contract drift (predicate compile gate), carryforward/prune CLI wiring. Every fix requires: TDD red-first, a regression test for the originating incident, adversarial audit, and a WIRING PROOF that the gate/guard actually fires in the composed production path. No inert API: every new exported surface ships with a caller and a naming test.

phases.name: cycle-recorded
phases.key_findings: cycle completed; ledger walk deferred to future slice

defects.summary: cycle did not pass audit; see audit-report.md + acs-verdict.json
defects.fix: address the audit findings recorded for this cycle

carryover.action: resolve the audit findings that failed cycle 975
